## India: DPDPA Implementation and Legal Challenges

India's Digital Personal Data Protection Act (DPDPA) and its accompanying rules are now formally in effect, initiating a new era of data privacy compliance. This implementation brings both opportunities for technology solutions and significant challenges for various sectors, particularly startups and adtech platforms, who must now navigate stringent data handling requirements. The Act's provisions are also expected to shape the future of enterprise AI development in India.
([IAPP - takes force](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiekFVX3lxTFA0MUhxR2JRbkZEUG81Smp1Uy02Z0xtdWZYSnlyLVJVSHQ2eWtleENVY2Iya2tVTUNveFE5Mm1FLUVwd01icDNwT0pqcFZyOGJVNmZSRGJoSjJUT21BOWxkOXFqTmhVRmNSVW5jSGFyQkVlblRoR2FTX01R), [Inc42](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMijAFBVV95cUxOSjQwcU1oTFlXZ0taQmdGQzI1dm5ralhINFUyTjlZNzZtYmg1b0JuYUZydDZlOVlfemQ1MU5LVl9RVDF5a2QyNWI2bXZWcXByTFJRYmszRmpRZnE4TXVCX2MySUZJSkpVLVFwOHFyaklFdHBuZXA5dlE5Ymw0R3JuY2xLcDFkVXBNNV9YbA?oc=5), [Agency Reporter](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMilgFBVV95cUxNZlN1dlg2Yjlpc2dKRHNBM3hWTExsb1Y2RGt5aGt3bmZvMnhHVUVyaTMyZ0hsRk9uMmlqbUF0eUZpUENtUEJIR1MwTjdTTm9rTkFEV2hmTVFSWk5Ya3FMVERxT3hmV04wSjZtQlBic3ZlNGdqY3BoV1R2cWg1NDYyMHE3SGYyMnNNM2tnU2lWNGN5Z0ZTRUE?oc=5), [CNBC TV18](https://news.google.?oc=5))

The Supreme Court has issued notices to the central government in response to multiple Public Interest Litigations (PILs) challenging the constitutional validity of the DPDPA and its recently notified rules. A key contention raised in these petitions is that certain provisions of the DPDPA may dilute the Right to Information (RTI) Act, potentially restricting public access to information.
([Internet Freedom Foundation](https://news.google.?oc=5), [Hindustan Times](https://news.google.?oc=5), [Telegraph India](https://news.google.?oc=5))

## India: Compliance Solutions and Commentary

In anticipation of the DPDPA's full enforcement, several technology companies are rolling out new services and partnerships aimed at assisting Indian enterprises with compliance. Netskope has launched an India-specific management plane to facilitate DPDPA adherence and data sovereignty, while iValue and Varonis have partnered to offer compliance support. These developments highlight the growing market for data protection solutions in India.
([ETCISO.in](https://news.google.
